description: Smart fee reminders and status improvements
changes: 🔵 New Admission status for freshly joined students
🟡 Due Soon badge — appears 3 days before monthly fee date
🔔 Smart notifications — only when fee is actually due
✅ Fixed ₹0 balance showing in due list
✅ Fixed new students showing as Due incorrectly
🟡 Pulsing Due Soon animation in status column
📊 Notification bell only counts real urgent students
